falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a trend reversal, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong market participation, refuting the HOLD and suggesting a clear directional move.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major policy shift would directly invalidate the current pattern's assumptions, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
